source_title: π₀: A Vision-Language-Action Flow Model for General Robot Control

ai_summary.one_liner: Generalist VLA policy using pre-trained VLM + flow matching action expert for multi-robot control
ai_summary.problem: No single generalist robot policy that works across diverse embodiments and tasks
ai_summary.solution: Pre-trained 3B VLM backbone with flow matching action expert, trained on 10K+ hours of diverse robot data
ai_summary.key_result: 50%+ max score on complex long-horizon tasks; strong zero-shot and fine-tuning transfer

research_gaps.question: **자체 데이터 비공개**: 사전학습 데이터의 90.9%가 비공개 자체 데이터(π 데이터셋)로, 외부 연구자의 재현성이 크게 제한됨
